description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has a round neckline with snipped edges and tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, chipped mural look graphic print on the front and yellow stitch detailing on the hems Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Wram iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this white T-shirt from probase. The chipped mural look graphic print on the front panel showing an old town street gives this tee a nostalgic vibe. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
